pageContext.name: Muhammad Ali
pageContext.description: Iconiq Studios are honored to present the first in our 1:6th scale Legends series, the heavyweight boxing legend himself: Muhammad Ali!  Featuring a fully-articulated seamless body that is custom-tailored to match Ali's own physique and is capable of recreating his iconic fighting style. The figure includes an authentic hand-sculpted head that captures The Greatest in the heat of a fight.  Boxing fans and lovers of the legendary Muhammad Ali, be sure to add this incredible figure to your collection today!
